title: Flame Swing
description: a simple texture pack that replaces the regular sweep animation with a blazing one!
body:
## Flame swing
This texture pack replaces the regular sweep particle with a flame swing animation instead, making fire sepect look even better ( also works if you dont have fire aspect ).

_Compatible with 1.21.11 and older versions_
![flame swing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/295cd4353642473b1f19cf9c8a92b8d89f7b33ed_0.webp)
